caption:
Eat out and stay FIT with the @menufit.app 🙌🏼

Steal these two orders next time you’re on the go 👇🏼

Raising Canes fit order:
5 naked chicken strips + Hot Louisiana sauce + Coke Zero 
(650 calories 65 G protein)

Popeyes fit order:
Signature Bone-In Chicken (Mild) Breast (1 pc) → Chicken & Sausage Jambalaya (Individual bowl) → Unsweetened Iced Tea
(600 calories 45 G protein)

Send this to all your FIT friends 🙌🏼

Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps 🔥

#macrofriendly #fitover40
